turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental, this is Ava. How can I help you today?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, I'd like to book a cleaning.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can help with that. May I get your full name?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks, Alice. We have Thursday at 2pm or Friday at 10am. Which works better for you?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Great — I've booked you for Thursday at 2pm. Can I grab an email to send the confirmation?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Perfect, that's alice.nguyen@example.com. Confirmation is on its way. Anything else I can help with?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: You're welcome, Alice. Have a great day!
